_doc: Torment (TOR) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/tor.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 55C / 44U / 44R / 0M. Collation: US: sequential collation, 10x11 sheets, two common runs (A 30 cards, B 25 cards); Belgian: striped collation. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Occasional foil (1:70) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Small set. Printed USA and Belgium. US booster commons: 6 from run A, 5 from run B. Foil 1:70 cards (note: higher rate than the 1:100 of surrounding sets). 36 packs per box.
